heading: Penalties and enforcement
label: 4224 Penalties and enforcement
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of authorities, functions, personnel, and assets of the Coast Guard, including the authorities and functions of the Secretary of Transportation relating thereto, to the Department of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 468(b), 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6

children.heading: Criminal violations
children.label: a Criminal violations
children.text: Whoever knowingly violates shall, upon conviction, be fined under title 18 or imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Civil violations
children.label: b Civil violations
children.text: Whoever violates may be assessed a civil penalty by the Secretary of not more than $5,000 for each such violation.section 4223 of this title

children.heading: Procedures for assessment of civil penalty
children.label: c Procedures for assessment of civil penalty
children.text: Proceedings for the assessment of a civil penalty under this section shall be conducted in accordance with the procedures provided for in .section 1540(a) of this title

children.heading: Use of penalties
children.label: d Use of penalties
children.text: Subject to appropriations, penalties collected under this section may be used by the Secretary of the Treasury to pay rewards under and, to the extent not used to pay such rewards, shall be deposited by the Secretary of the Treasury into the Fund.section 4225 of this title

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: e Enforcement
children.text: The Secretary, the Secretary of the Treasury, and the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating shall enforce this subchapter in the same manner such Secretaries carry out enforcement activities under . shall apply to actions arising under this subchapter.section 1540(e) of this titleSection 1540(c) of this title
